languages.text: "Властью, дарованной мне сенешалем, я дозволяю вам сохранить честь и признаться в содеянном."

traits.locale_text: "Властью, дарованной мне сенешалем, я дозволяю вам сохранить честь и признаться в содеянном."

languages.text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."
languages.original_text: "Властью, дарованной мне сенешалем, я дозволяю вам сохранить честь и признаться в содеянном."

traits.locale_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."
"By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."
"By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

languages.text: «Por el poder que me ha otorgado la Senescal, le concedo permiso para conservar su honor y confesar su crimen».
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: «Por el poder que me ha otorgado la Senescal, le concedo permiso para conservar su honor y confesar su crimen».

languages.text: “凭总领赋予我的权力，我准许你保留荣誉并认罪。”
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: “凭总领赋予我的权力，我准许你保留荣誉并认罪。”

languages.text: « En vertu des pouvoirs qui me sont conférés par la sénéchale, je vous autorise à sauver votre honneur en confessant votre crime. »
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: « En vertu des pouvoirs qui me sont conférés par la sénéchale, je vous autorise à sauver votre honneur en confessant votre crime. »

languages.text: "Seneşal'in bana verdiği yetkiyle, onurunu koruman ve suçunu itiraf etmen için sana izin veriyorum."
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: "Seneşal'in bana verdiği yetkiyle, onurunu koruman ve suçunu itiraf etmen için sana izin veriyorum."

languages.text: "Kraft der mir vom Truchsess übertragenen Befugnis beurlaube ich Euch, damit Ihr Eure Ehre wahren und Euer Verbrechen gestehen könnt."
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: "Kraft der mir vom Truchsess übertragenen Befugnis beurlaube ich Euch, damit Ihr Eure Ehre wahren und Euer Verbrechen gestehen könnt."

languages.text: 「私は、摂政の権限によって、貴方の名誉を守り、罪を告白することを許します。」
languages.original_text: "By the power conferred on me by the Seneschal, I grant you leave to preserve your honour and confess your crime."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、摂政の権限によって、貴方の名誉を守り、罪を告白することを許します。」
